title: guettarda dioica
intro: Guettarda dioica is a tropical plant species commonly known as the "White Guettarda" or "Sandpaper Tree" due to its unique, sandpapery leaves. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly as an antiseptic and anti-inflammatory agent, which help to reduce swelling and fight infections. The plant is also believed to have various health benefits, including lowering blood pressure, reducing fever, and acting as an antiseptic to promote wound healing. Guettarda dioica can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, which can be used to take advantage of its medicinal and health benefits.
